description: Multiple unspecified vulnerabilities in Oracle E-Business Suite and Applications 11.5.10 have unknown impact and attack vectors, as identified by Vuln# (1) APPS03 in (a) iProcurement; (2) APPS04 in (b) Oracle Application Object Library; (3) APPS06, (4) APPS07, and (5) APPS08 in (c) Oracle Applications Technology Stack; and (6) APPS11 in (d) Oracle Order Capture.
